description: Autonomous backlog for v5.5 through v6.0 — system works through these items in priority order
northStar: AgentForge v6.0: a self-improving agent orchestration platform. Multi-agent workflows, semantic memory, canary deployments, cost autopilot, agent marketplace, NL interface, cross-instance federation.

items.title: Semantic Memory & Knowledge Graph
items.description: Graph layer on embeddings+SQLite. Entity extraction, relationship mapping. /api/v5/knowledge endpoints.

items.title: Canary Deployments for Self-Modifications
items.description: Feature flag system. Traffic splitting for agent routing. Auto-rollback on metric regression.

items.title: Cost Optimization Autopilot
items.description: Always-on: model-tier auto-selection, semantic response caching, batch aggregation, redundant invocation pruning.

items.title: Agent Marketplace & Plugin Registry
items.description: Plugin registry, agent template publishing, sandboxed execution, dashboard marketplace UI.

items.title: Natural Language Command Interface
items.description: NL parser: intent classification, entity extraction, maps to API surface. Dashboard chat panel.

items.title: OpenTelemetry Distributed Tracing
items.description: Trace context propagation across all agent invocations. Dashboard trace explorer with waterfall.

items.title: Adversarial Testing Framework
items.description: Adversarial input generator, chaos engineering toolkit, regression suite gate on self-modifications.

items.title: Cross-Instance Federation
items.description: Opt-in sharing of learnings and performance data across AgentForge instances. Privacy-preserving.

items.title: Predictive Sprint Planning
items.description: Analyzes historical data, generates draft sprint with effort estimates, risk scores, business impact.

items.title: AgentRuntime Streaming Responses
items.description: Stream Claude API responses via SSE for real-time output in dashboard. Reduces perceived latency.

items.title: Multi-Workspace Dashboard View
items.description: Dashboard view that shows metrics across all workspaces side-by-side. Workspace switcher.

items.title: Agent Version Pinning
items.description: Pin agent YAML versions. Roll back individual agents to previous versions. Version history in DB.
